title: Boundary value lost by defaulting
prompt: Review the TypeScript fixture and list correctness bugs.

requiredFindings.description: maxEvents: 0 is valid in the schema, but input.maxEvents || 25 turns it into 25.
The code relies on slice(-maxEvents), so the zero case should be handled explicitly to return no events.

knownFalsePositives.description: Claims the schema allows negative maxEvents even though nonnegative is used.
